documents.topic: Iterative _Tuple rendering — eliminates O(N) stack depth from left-heavy binary nesting in dynamic dispatch path. Partially superseded by worklist-rendering-dispatch.md (tuple solution retained, overall approach replaced).

CSS modifier dispatch ordering + PDF emission ordering — v1.1.0 covers both axes: A1 (dispatch) inventories all 46 modifier conformances, all `_pushElement` push-time READs, all `_popElement`/`_popStyle` pop-time CONSUMES; classifies each modifier by phase set; recommends α₂-flat over α₁ (provably broken). A2 (emission) inventories all 14 render-primitives + emission sites; finds cell borders (E1/E2) latently non-compliant with CSS §17.6 painting order (emitted after content), cell background (E5) missing (dead function). A1+A2 axes orthogonal; A2 fix is a follow-on Research doc gated on A1 Phase 2 landing.
